overview.description: The Nomura Tax-Free USA ETF (LTAX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund focusing on municipal bonds of various maturities issued by the state and local government. The fund primarily selects investment grade rated bonds but may hold high yield rated up to 20%. LTAX was launched on Jan 12, 2026 and is issued by Nomura.
